data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_FastRunningCurrent: The sea between PACIFIDLOG and\nSLATEPORT has a fast-running tide.\pIf you decide to SURF, you could end\nup swept away somewhere else.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_NeatHousesOnWater: See, isn't it neat?\nThese houses are on water!\pI was born here!
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_FishAndDiveLifestyle: The folks of PACIFIDLOG all fish and\ndive as part of the lifestyle.
data/maps/PacifidlogTown/text.inc.PacifidlogTown_Text_TownSign: PACIFIDLOG TOWN\p“Where the morning sun smiles upon\nthe waters.”
